name: BackgroundTypeWallpaper
description: The background is a wallpaper in the JPEG format.

fields.name: dark_theme_dimming
fields.description: Dimming of the background in dark themes, as a percentage; 0-100

fields.name: is_blurred
fields.description: True, if the wallpaper is downscaled to fit in a 450x450 square and then box-blurred with radius 12

fields.name: is_moving
fields.description: True, if the background moves slightly when the device is tilted
